name: Micro-Purchase Readiness
description: Helping COs and purchase card holders use ARCG for purchases at or below the general FAR micro-purchase threshold (currently $15,000; exceptions apply). The general MPT was raised from $10,000 to $15,000 effective 2025-10-01 per FAR 2.101.

name: Simplified Acquisition Support
description: ARCG specializes in under-$250K work as a stated operator preference. The legal Simplified Acquisition Threshold (SAT) value must be verified against FAR 2.101 before any public claim quotes a dollar value — sole-source SDVOSB, set-aside, and RFQ posture vary with the current SAT and exceptions.
